% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	& {(X\otimes Y) \otimes Z} & \\
	{(Y\otimes X) \otimes Z} && {X\otimes (Y\otimes Z)} \\
	{Y\otimes (X\otimes Z)} && {X\otimes (Z\otimes Y)} \\
	{Y\otimes (Z\otimes X)} && {(X\otimes Z) \otimes Y} \\
	{(Y\otimes Z) \otimes X} && {(Z\otimes X) \otimes Y} \\
	{(Z\otimes Y) \otimes X} && {Z\otimes(X\otimes Y)} \\
	& {Z\otimes(Y\otimes X)}
	\arrow["{{\tau_{X,Y}\otimes \id_Z}}"', from=1-2, to=2-1]
	\arrow["{{\alpha_{X,Y,Z}}}", color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=1-2, to=2-3]
	\arrow["{\tau_{X\otimes Y, Z}}"', color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=1-2, to=6-3]
	\arrow["{{\alpha_{Y,X,Z}}}"', color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=2-1, to=3-1]
	\arrow["{\tau_{Y\otimes X, Z}}", color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=2-1, to=7-2]
	\arrow["{{\id_X \otimes \tau_{Y,Z}}}", color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=2-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{{\id_Y \otimes \tau_{X,Z}}}"', color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=3-1, to=4-1]
	\arrow["{{\alpha_{X,Z,Y}^{-1}}}", color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=3-3, to=4-3]
	\arrow["{{\alpha_{Y,Z,X}^{-1}}}"', color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=4-1, to=5-1]
	\arrow["{{\tau_{X,Z} \otimes \id_Y}}", color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=4-3, to=5-3]
	\arrow["{{\tau_{Y,Z} \otimes \id_X}}"', color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=5-1, to=6-1]
	\arrow["{{\alpha_{Z,X,Y}}}", color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=5-3, to=6-3]
	\arrow["{{\alpha_{Z,Y,X}}}"', color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=6-1, to=7-2]
	\arrow["{{\id_Z \otimes \tau_{X,Y}}}", from=6-3, to=7-2]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
